park_name: BIG4 Iluka on Freycinet Holiday Park
rationale_top3: Outstanding natural setting with exceptional nature score (18/20) placing guests in the heart of Freycinet's pristine wilderness High cleanliness standards (13/15) ensuring well-maintained facilities throughout the park Good entertainment facilities (12/15) providing adequate amenities for family activities
rationale_honourable: Strong location score (9/10) offering convenient access to Freycinet National Park attractions Solid value proposition (10/15) delivering reasonable pricing for the Freycinet region
water_fun: Coastal location near Freycinet's pristine beaches and bays, providing access to swimming, kayaking and water activities in the surrounding area
kids_play: Good entertainment facilities with playground equipment and family activity areas to keep children engaged during downtime from exploring the national park
pet_detail: No pet facilities or pet-friendly accommodation available based on zero pet score
best_for: Families and nature enthusiasts wanting clean, well-equipped accommodation as a base for exploring Freycinet National Park's iconic Wineglass Bay and coastal walks
